Privacy/data usage concerns due to excessive data transmission and storage
Intrusive UI elements (bright white flash, persistent notification, on-screen button)
Inconsistent performance across different phone models/OS updates
Filter doesn't cover notification panel/status bar, creating bright spots

switching_triggers.reason: Apps were unreliable, turned off randomly, or lacked features
switching_triggers.threshold: After repeated failures causing eye strain

switching_triggers.reason: Lowest brightness still too bright for dark environments
switching_triggers.threshold: Needing to turn on room lights to avoid eye strain

switching_triggers.reason: Did not dim screen areas around phone notch
switching_triggers.threshold: Switching to a phone with a notch design

deal_breakers: App turns off filter randomly during use
Excessive data usage/privacy violations
OS permission issues making app unusable
Filter doesn't work after screen lock

pain_points.signal: Device default settings inadequate for eye comfort in low light
Uncontrollable privacy/data collection by app
App turns off unexpectedly or behaves erratically (auto timer, self-off)
Persistent, unremovable notification bar taking up space
App drains battery rather than saving it
Inconsistent functionality (notification bar controls, display over apps)
Does not adapt to device orientation (landscape/portrait)
Bright pop-up apps not dimmed by filter

desired_outcomes.outcome: Customizable screen dimming/color for eye comfort in different conditions/times
Reliable, stable operation without unexpected shutdowns or erratic timers
Functional controls via notification bar and over other apps
No battery drain, or actual battery savings
Privacy-respecting, no unwanted data collection
Clean, unobtrusive interface without unremovable notifications
Compatibility with various Android versions and device orientations

purchase_triggers.trigger: Device lacks built-in night mode or eye comfort features
purchase_triggers.context: Default device settings cause eye strain, especially in low light.

purchase_triggers.trigger: Dissatisfaction with existing solutions (e.g., color inversion)
purchase_triggers.context: Built-in alternatives are ineffective or unpleasant.

purchase_triggers.trigger: Need for highly customizable brightness and color adjustment
purchase_triggers.context: Users want control for different room conditions, times of day, or personal sensitivity.

objections.objection: Privacy concerns: app collects and sells personal data, ignores 'do not track'
App does not save battery as advertised; may even increase consumption
Unreliable features (notification bar controls, auto timer, display over apps)
Intrusive, unremovable notification toolbar

switching_triggers.from_product: Default device settings or built-in night mode
switching_triggers.reason: Inadequate dimming, poor eye comfort, or lack of customization.
switching_triggers.threshold: Eye strain persists despite low brightness; user seeks more control.

switching_triggers.reason: Ads, pop-ups, bugs, crashes, or poor performance.
switching_triggers.threshold: Frustration with intrusive ads, instability, or unreliable functionality.

deal_breakers: Invasive data collection/selling of personal information
Significant battery drain contrary to claims
Critical features broken or non-functional (e.g., won't stay on)
